tasks.title: Initialize Next.js project with TypeScript
tasks.description: DO NOT use create-next-app (it hangs in non-interactive mode). Instead, manually create: package.json with next/react/react-dom deps and scripts (dev, build, start), tsconfig.json with strict mode and @/ path alias pointing to src/, next.config.js (empty config), .gitignore (node_modules, .next, .env, data/, uploads/, .ralph/.server-env), and the directory structure: src/app/, src/components/, src/lib/, src/hooks/, src/types/, data/, uploads/. Then run npm install.

tasks.title: Install all project dependencies
tasks.description: Install production deps: @mui/material @emotion/react @emotion/styled @mui/icons-material socket.io socket.io-client prisma @prisma/client jsonwebtoken bcryptjs cookie uuid livekit-server-sdk @livekit/components-react. Install dev deps: @types/jsonwebtoken @types/bcryptjs @types/cookie @types/node @types/react @types/react-dom typescript.

tasks.title: Create Prisma schema with all models
tasks.description: Create prisma/schema.prisma with SQLite datasource (file:../data/discord.db). Define all models: User, Server, Channel, Message, ServerMember with all fields, relations, indexes, cascade rules, and @@unique constraints per the database spec.

tasks.title: Run initial Prisma migration and create DB client
tasks.description: Run npx prisma migrate dev --name init to generate the initial migration. Create src/lib/db.ts exporting a singleton PrismaClient instance (with global caching for dev hot-reload).

tasks.title: Implement auth helper and JWT utilities
tasks.description: Create src/lib/auth.ts with functions: signToken(userId, username) returns a JWT with 7-day expiry, verifyToken(token) returns decoded payload or null, getAuthUser(req) reads the 'token' cookie from request headers, verifies it, and returns { userId, username } or null. Uses JWT_SECRET env var.

tasks.title: Implement registration API route
tasks.description: Create src/app/api/auth/register/route.ts — POST handler. Validate username (3-20 chars alphanumeric), email format, password (min 6 chars). Hash password with bcryptjs (10 rounds). Create User in DB via Prisma. Sign JWT, set httpOnly cookie, return { user: { id, username, email } }.

tasks.title: Implement login API route
tasks.description: Create src/app/api/auth/login/route.ts — POST handler. Accept { email, password }. Look up user by email via Prisma. Compare password with bcryptjs. If valid, sign JWT, set httpOnly cookie, return user object. If invalid, return 401.

tasks.title: Implement logout and current user API routes
tasks.description: Create src/app/api/auth/logout/route.ts — POST handler that clears the token cookie. Create src/app/api/auth/me/route.ts — GET handler that calls getAuthUser(req), returns user object from DB (id, username, email, avatarUrl) or 401.

tasks.title: Create ThemeRegistry and useThemeMode hook
tasks.description: Create src/hooks/useThemeMode.tsx — ThemeModeProvider context with dark/light toggle, localStorage persistence. Primary #5865F2, dark bg #121212/paper #1e1e1e, light bg #f5f5f5/paper #ffffff. Create src/components/common/ThemeRegistry.tsx wrapping ThemeProvider + CssBaseline. Same pattern as MarchMadness.

tasks.title: Create useAuth hook and AuthProvider
tasks.description: Create src/hooks/useAuth.tsx — AuthProvider context. On mount calls /api/auth/me to check session. Exposes { user, login, register, logout, loading }. login() POSTs to /api/auth/login, register() POSTs to /api/auth/register, logout() POSTs to /api/auth/logout. Same pattern as MarchMadness.

tasks.title: Create root layout with providers
tasks.description: Create src/app/layout.tsx wrapping children in ThemeRegistry > AuthProvider. Create src/app/globals.css with minimal base styles (body margin 0, box-sizing border-box).

tasks.title: Build login and registration UI
tasks.description: Create src/components/auth/AuthForm.tsx — MUI Card with toggle between Login and Register modes. Email + password fields (plus username for register). Uses useAuth hook for submit. Shows validation errors via MUI Alert. Create src/app/page.tsx — if authenticated redirect to /servers, otherwise render AuthForm.

tasks.title: Create server.js with Next.js wrapper and webhook handler
tasks.description: Create server.js at project root. Wrap Next.js with custom HTTP server (same pattern as MarchMadness server.js). Add /api/webhook POST handler with HMAC SHA-256 signature verification using WEBHOOK_SECRET. Listen on PORT env var (default 3003). This is needed BEFORE Socket.io — Socket.io gets added later.

tasks.title: Create deploy_webhook.sh
tasks.description: Create deploy_webhook.sh at project root — matching MarchMadness pattern: lock file, git fetch/reset origin main, conditional npm install if package.json changed, npx prisma migrate deploy, rm -rf .next, npm run build, pm2 restart discord-alt. Log to /var/log/webhook_deploy_discord.log.

tasks.title: Create .env.example, set up nginx, and do first deploy
tasks.description: Create .env.example with all required vars. SSH into server, set up nginx config for discord.edgecdec.com proxying to localhost:3003 (match pattern of other sites). Clone repo to /var/www/DiscordAlternative, npm install, prisma migrate, build, start with pm2. Verify curl returns 200. Generate JWT_SECRET and add to server .env.

tasks.title: Implement create server API route
tasks.description: Create src/app/api/servers/route.ts — POST handler. Requires auth. Accepts { name, imageUrl? }. Creates Server with uuid inviteCode. Creates default 'general' TEXT channel. Creates ServerMember with role OWNER. Returns full server object.

tasks.title: Implement list user servers API route
tasks.description: Add GET handler to src/app/api/servers/route.ts — returns all servers the authenticated user is a member of, including channels and member count via Prisma include/count.

tasks.title: Implement server detail API route
tasks.description: Create src/app/api/servers/[serverId]/route.ts — GET handler. Validates user is a member. Returns full server with channels and members (including user info).

tasks.title: Create maintenance.html page with minigame
tasks.description: Create maintenance.html at project root — a self-contained HTML page (no external deps) shown by nginx when the app is down (502/503/504). Include a fun minigame (e.g. simple snake, pong, or click counter) to keep users entertained during deploys. Style it to match the app theme (dark bg #121212, primary #5865F2). nginx is already configured to serve it via error_page directive. Same pattern as MarchMadness maintenance.html.

tasks.title: Build server sidebar component
tasks.description: Create src/components/layout/ServerSidebar.tsx — narrow vertical Box (~72px) showing server icons as MUI Avatar with first letter of name. Active server highlighted with colored left border. Add icon button at bottom for creating servers. Clicking navigates to /servers/[serverId].

tasks.title: Fix: database tables missing on production server
tasks.description: URGENT: The production server at discord.edgecdec.com returns 'The table main.User does not exist' when registering. The Prisma migration was not applied to the production DB. SSH into the server, diagnose why the tables are missing (check data/discord.db, check prisma config datasource URL, check if prisma migrate deploy actually creates tables). Fix it so the migration runs correctly. Verify by curling the register endpoint. Also ensure deploy_webhook.sh runs prisma migrate deploy correctly on future deploys.

tasks.title: Create seed script with test user and test credentials file
tasks.description: Create a seed script (seed.js or similar) that creates a test user in the DB if it doesn't exist (username: testbot, password: testpass123). Run it on the server via SSH. Create ~/.config/discord-alt-creds.env on the LOCAL machine with TESTBOT_USER=testbot and TESTBOT_PASS=testpass123. This file is used by Nova Act tests to authenticate without hardcoding credentials. Also create an admin test user (username: ralphbot, password: ralphpass123) and add ADMIN_USER/ADMIN_PASS to the creds file.

tasks.title: Set up Nova Act browser testing for UI verification
tasks.description: For all future UI tasks, after deploying to the remote server, write a temporary Nova Act test script to verify the feature works in a real browser against the LIVE site (https://discord.edgecdec.com). Pattern: 1) source ~/.config/discord-alt-creds.env. 2) Get auth cookie via curl against the live site: curl -s -c /tmp/discord-cookie.txt -X POST https://discord.edgecdec.com/api/auth/login -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"username":"$TESTBOT_USER","password":"$TESTBOT_PASS"}'. 3) Start NovaAct at https://discord.edgecdec.com with the cookie file — no login steps needed. 4) Use short one-sentence prompts per act() call. 5) Print PASS/FAIL. 6) Run with /opt/homebrew/bin/python3.13. 7) Delete temp script after verification. Add this pattern to .ralph/specs/anti-patterns.md under a 'Nova Act Testing' section so all future iterations follow it. Reference ~/TestProjects/TestApplication/PROMPT.md for the full cookie-based auth bypass pattern.

tasks.title: Create constants.ts with size limits and retrofit existing routes
tasks.description: Create src/lib/constants.ts with all size limits: USERNAME_MIN=3, USERNAME_MAX=20, PASSWORD_MIN=6, PASSWORD_MAX=128, SERVER_NAME_MIN=1, SERVER_NAME_MAX=50, CHANNEL_NAME_MIN=1, CHANNEL_NAME_MAX=50, MESSAGE_MAX=2000, FILE_UPLOAD_MAX_BYTES=5*1024*1024, AVATAR_URL_MAX=512, MESSAGES_PER_PAGE=50. Update existing API routes (register, login, create server) to import and use these constants instead of hardcoded values. Update AuthForm.tsx to set maxLength on TextFields.

tasks.title: Build create server dialog
tasks.description: Create src/components/layout/CreateServerDialog.tsx — MUI Dialog with TextField for server name. On submit POSTs to /api/servers. On success navigates to the new server. Triggered by Add button in ServerSidebar.

tasks.title: Implement create channel API route
tasks.description: Create src/app/api/servers/[serverId]/channels/route.ts — POST handler. Accepts { name, type }. Validates user is OWNER or ADMIN of the server. Creates channel via Prisma. Returns channel object.

tasks.title: Implement update and delete channel API routes
tasks.description: Create src/app/api/channels/[channelId]/route.ts — PATCH handler accepts { name? }, validates OWNER/ADMIN. DELETE handler validates OWNER/ADMIN and prevents deleting the last TEXT channel in the server.

tasks.title: Build channel list panel component
tasks.description: Create src/components/layout/ChannelPanel.tsx — ~240px Box. Server name Typography header. Channel list using MUI List/ListItemButton grouped by type: text channels with Tag icon, voice with VolumeUp icon. Active channel highlighted. Add Channel button for OWNER/ADMIN (opens a simple dialog).

tasks.title: Build user info panel in channel panel
tasks.description: Add a user info section at the bottom of ChannelPanel — shows current user Avatar, username Typography, theme toggle IconButton (DarkMode/LightMode), and settings IconButton. Uses useAuth for user data and useThemeMode for toggle.

tasks.title: Create the three-column layout shell and server pages
tasks.description: Create src/app/servers/[serverId]/layout.tsx — flexbox row with ServerSidebar (left), ChannelPanel (middle), children (right, flex:1). Create src/app/servers/[serverId]/page.tsx — reads server channels, redirects to first TEXT channel. Create src/app/servers/[serverId]/channels/[channelId]/page.tsx — placeholder showing channel name.

tasks.title: Implement get messages API route
tasks.description: Create src/app/api/channels/[channelId]/messages/route.ts — GET handler. Validates user is member of the channel's server. Returns messages with author info (id, username, avatarUrl), ordered by createdAt desc, cursor-based pagination (take 50, optional cursor query param).

tasks.title: Implement create message API route
tasks.description: Add POST handler to src/app/api/channels/[channelId]/messages/route.ts — accepts { content, fileUrl? }. Validates user is member. Creates message via Prisma with authorId. Returns message with author info.

tasks.title: Implement edit and delete message API routes
tasks.description: Create src/app/api/messages/[messageId]/route.ts — PATCH handler accepts { content }, validates author owns message. DELETE handler validates author or server admin, sets deleted=true (soft delete). Both return updated message.

tasks.title: Create Socket.io type definitions
tasks.description: Create src/types/socket.ts — define ServerToClientEvents interface (message:new, message:updated, message:deleted, presence:online, presence:offline, typing:start, typing:stop) and ClientToServerEvents interface (channel:join, channel:leave, message:create, message:update, message:delete, typing:start, typing:stop). Define payload type for each event.

tasks.title: Add Socket.io to server.js with auth
tasks.description: Update existing server.js to attach Socket.io Server to the HTTP server. On connection: parse JWT from cookie in handshake headers, verify with auth helper, attach userId/username to socket, reject if invalid. server.js already handles Next.js requests and webhook — just add Socket.io on top.

tasks.title: Implement Socket.io channel join/leave handlers
tasks.description: In server.js, implement channel:join handler — validate user is member of the channel's server via Prisma query, join socket to room 'channel:<channelId>'. Implement channel:leave — leave the room.

tasks.title: Implement Socket.io message:create handler
tasks.description: In server.js, implement message:create handler — validate membership, persist message to DB via Prisma (with authorId from socket), query back with author include, broadcast message:new to channel room.

tasks.title: Implement Socket.io message:update and message:delete handlers
tasks.description: In server.js, implement message:update — validate author owns message, update content in DB, broadcast message:updated to channel room. Implement message:delete — validate author or admin, soft-delete in DB, broadcast message:deleted with { messageId } to channel room.

tasks.title: Implement Socket.io presence tracking
tasks.description: In server.js, maintain in-memory Map<userId, Set<socketId>> for online tracking. On connection, add to map, query user's servers, broadcast presence:online { userId, username } to those server rooms. On disconnect, remove from map, if no sockets left broadcast presence:offline { userId }.

tasks.title: Implement Socket.io typing indicators
tasks.description: In server.js, implement typing:start handler — broadcast { userId, username, channelId } to channel room excluding sender. Implement typing:stop — same broadcast pattern excluding sender.

tasks.title: Create useSocket hook
tasks.description: Create src/hooks/useSocket.ts — SocketProvider context. Connects to Socket.io when user is authenticated (from useAuth). Typed with ClientToServerEvents/ServerToClientEvents. Auto-reconnects. Exposes socket instance and joinChannel/leaveChannel helpers.

tasks.title: Build MessageList component with initial fetch
tasks.description: Create src/components/chat/MessageList.tsx — accepts channelId prop. On mount fetches messages from /api/channels/[channelId]/messages. Renders scrollable MUI Box. Each message shows Avatar, username Typography, timestamp, content Typography. Auto-scrolls to bottom on load.

tasks.title: Add real-time message listeners to MessageList
tasks.description: Update MessageList to listen for message:new (append to list, auto-scroll), message:updated (update in place), message:deleted (mark as deleted) via useSocket. Messages update in real-time without refresh.

tasks.title: Add cursor-based pagination to MessageList
tasks.description: Update MessageList — detect scroll to top, fetch older messages using cursor param from the oldest message ID. Prepend to list while maintaining scroll position. Show loading indicator while fetching. Stop when no more messages returned.

tasks.title: Build MessageInput component
tasks.description: Create src/components/chat/MessageInput.tsx — MUI TextField with Send IconButton. On submit emits message:create via socket with { channelId, content }. Enter sends, Shift+Enter newline. Clears input on send.

tasks.title: Add typing indicator emission to MessageInput
tasks.description: Update MessageInput — emit typing:start on keypress (debounced, max once per 2 seconds). Emit typing:stop when user stops typing for 3 seconds or sends message.

tasks.title: Build TypingIndicator component
tasks.description: Create src/components/chat/TypingIndicator.tsx — listens for typing:start/typing:stop via useSocket. Shows 'Username is typing...' or 'X users are typing...' as small Typography below MessageInput. Auto-clears after 4 second timeout per user.

tasks.title: Assemble the text channel page
tasks.description: Update src/app/servers/[serverId]/channels/[channelId]/page.tsx — for TEXT channels: show channel name header with # icon, render MessageList, TypingIndicator, MessageInput. Call joinChannel on mount, leaveChannel on unmount/channel change.

tasks.title: Implement invite code API routes
tasks.description: Create src/app/api/servers/[serverId]/invite/route.ts — GET handler returns { inviteCode } for members only. Create src/app/api/servers/invite/[code]/route.ts — POST handler joins server via invite code, creates ServerMember GUEST role, rejects if already member.

tasks.title: Build invite page
tasks.description: Create src/app/invite/[code]/page.tsx — looks up server by invite code, shows server name and Join button. On click POSTs to /api/servers/invite/[code], redirects to server on success. If already member, redirects directly.

tasks.title: Implement list members API route
tasks.description: Create src/app/api/servers/[serverId]/members/route.ts — GET handler. Validates user is member. Returns all ServerMembers with user info (id, username, avatarUrl) and roles.

tasks.title: Implement change role and kick member API routes
tasks.description: Create src/app/api/servers/[serverId]/members/[memberId]/route.ts — PATCH handler changes role (OWNER only). DELETE handler kicks member (OWNER/ADMIN only, cannot kick OWNER).

tasks.title: Build online members sidebar
tasks.description: Create src/components/layout/MemberList.tsx — right sidebar showing server members grouped by role (OWNER, ADMIN, MODERATOR, GUEST). Green/gray dot for online/offline status via presence events from useSocket. Fetches members from /api/servers/[serverId]/members.

tasks.title: Bug fix: messages require page refresh to appear
tasks.description: BUG: New messages sent by other users do not appear in real-time — the page must be refreshed to see them. Diagnose the full Socket.io chain: 1) Check server.js message:create handler actually broadcasts message:new to the channel room. 2) Check MessageList subscribes to message:new via useSocket. 3) Check the socket actually joins the channel room on mount (channel:join event). 4) Check useSocket connects successfully (verify JWT cookie is sent in handshake). 5) Test with two browser tabs — send a message in one, verify it appears in the other without refresh. Use pm2 logs on the server to see if socket events are firing. Fix whatever is broken.

tasks.title: Implement LiveKit token generation API route
tasks.description: Create src/app/api/livekit/token/route.ts — POST handler. Requires auth. Accepts { channelId }. Validates membership and channel type VOICE/VIDEO. Generates LiveKit access token with livekit-server-sdk: room channel:<channelId>, identity user:<userId>, grants roomJoin/canPublish/canSubscribe, 1h expiry. Returns { token }.

tasks.title: Build VoiceChannel component
tasks.description: Create src/components/voice/VoiceChannel.tsx — accepts channelId. Fetches token from /api/livekit/token. Wraps in LiveKitRoom provider connecting to NEXT_PUBLIC_LIVEKIT_URL. Renders participant list with audio tracks via @livekit/components-react. Mute/unmute and disconnect MUI IconButtons.

tasks.title: Wire voice channel into channel page
tasks.description: Update channel page — check channel type. If VOICE or VIDEO, render VoiceChannel component instead of MessageList/MessageInput. Show channel name with VolumeUp icon.

tasks.title: Implement update server API route
tasks.description: Add PATCH handler to src/app/api/servers/[serverId]/route.ts — accepts { name?, imageUrl? }. Validates user is OWNER or ADMIN. Updates server via Prisma. Returns updated server.

tasks.title: Implement delete server API route
tasks.description: Add DELETE handler to src/app/api/servers/[serverId]/route.ts — validates user is OWNER. Deletes server (cascades to channels, messages, members). Returns 204.

tasks.title: Build server settings dialog — general tab
tasks.description: Create src/components/layout/ServerSettings.tsx — MUI Dialog triggered from settings icon in ChannelPanel. General tab: rename server TextField, display invite code with copy-to-clipboard button. Calls PATCH /api/servers/[serverId] on save.

tasks.title: Add members tab to server settings
tasks.description: Add Members tab to ServerSettings dialog — list members with role badges. OWNER sees role change dropdown and kick button per member. Calls PATCH/DELETE on /api/servers/[serverId]/members/[memberId].

tasks.title: Add danger zone tab to server settings
tasks.description: Add Danger Zone tab to ServerSettings — red-styled delete server button with confirmation dialog. Only visible to OWNER. Calls DELETE /api/servers/[serverId], redirects to /servers on success.

tasks.title: Add mobile responsive layout with Drawer
tasks.description: Update the three-column layout — on screens <768px, hide ServerSidebar and ChannelPanel, show hamburger Menu IconButton in channel header. Clicking opens MUI Drawer containing both panels. Same pattern as MarchMadness mobile nav.
